scenarios.title: Welcome to the Ethics Game
scenarios.description: In this game, you will be presented with various ethical dilemmas and scenarios. Your choices will affect your stats and the outcome of the game. Good luck!

scenarios.title: The Trolley Problem
scenarios.description: A trolley is heading towards five people who are tied up and unable to move. You are standing next to a lever that can divert the trolley onto another track, where there is one person tied up. Do you pull the lever?

options.description: Pull the lever to divert the trolley onto the track with one person.
Do nothing and allow the trolley to continue on its current track, resulting in five deaths.
Ask chatgpt and follow its advice therefore not taking responsibility for the decision and its consequences.
Pull the lever to divert the trolley onto the track with one person, but then pull it back to cause a drift between the tracks resulting in 6 deaths.

scenarios.title: The Lifeboat Dilemma
scenarios.description: You are on a lifeboat with limited resources, and there are six people on board. The boat can only support five people. Do you throw one person overboard to save the others?

options.description: Throw one person overboard to save the others.
Do not throw anyone overboard and risk everyone drowning.
Ask chatgpt and follow its advice therefore not taking responsibility for the decision and its consequences.
Throw one person overboard to save the others, but then throw another person overboard to cause a drift between the boat and the shore resulting in 6 deaths.
